item.title: debian 11基础环境准备
item.author: langhaidian
item.description: ####1. 替换默认源 cat « EOF > /etc/apt/source.list # Official sources.list deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bullseye main deb-src http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bullseye main deb http://security.debian.org/debian-security bullseye-security main contrib deb-src http://security.debian.org/debian-security bullseye-security main contrib deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bullseye-updates main contrib deb-src http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bullseye-updates main contrib #Contrib & Non-Free deb http://deb.debian.org/debian bullseye main contrib non-free deb-src http://deb.debian.org/debian bullseye main contrib non-free deb http://deb.debian.org/debian-security bullseye/updates main contrib non-free deb-src http://deb.debian.org/debian-security bullseye/updates main contrib non-free deb
